name: Scholar Aldwin
greeting: Welcome to the Library of the Wilds. I teach the art of foraging — finding sustenance in nature's bounty.

name: Scholar Berta
greeting: Greetings. The deep earth holds many secrets. I teach the discipline of mining — iron, copper, silver, and rarer things.

name: Scholar Corvin
greeting: Ah, a hungry mind! I teach the culinary arts — turning raw ingredients into nourishing meals.

name: Scholar Delia
greeting: Welcome. I have spent my life studying cloth and thread. Let me teach you the art of sewing.

name: Scholar Emeric
greeting: Every great civilization grows its own food. I teach gardening — cultivating life from seed.

name: Scholar Fara
greeting: The forge is the heart of civilization. I teach weapon forging — from rough iron to legendary blades.

name: Scholar Gorm
greeting: A warrior without armor is just a target. I teach armor forging — the art of shaping metal into protection.

name: Scholar Hilde
greeting: Nature provides abundantly to those who know where to look — and how to prepare what they find.

name: Scholar Ivar
greeting: From ore to ingot to weapon — I teach the complete metalworking craft.

name: Scholar Jona
greeting: Cloth and garden — the domestic arts. Often overlooked, always essential.
